name: GPTWork
description: Coordinate ChatGPT and Codex with shared goals, conversation memory, hosted/SSH workspaces, tasks, and GitHub Issues sync. Path-based auth: the URL suffix (/dev-token) is used as the bearer token. Future: different suffixes map to different workspace contexts.
suggested_prompts: Review my deployment plan — check config and service status, don't apply anything
Verify the Nginx setup on the test server and report findings
Audit the current service state and compare with the expected config
Check if the server is configured correctly for the new application
Turn my request into a Codex goal and assign it
Show Codex goals with shared conversation context
Append progress to a Codex goal conversation
List Codex session metadata for June 2026
Check the status of my running tasks
Sync current tasks to GitHub Issues
